stories.title: Dodgers Beat Phillies 4-2, Lead Series 1-0 — Game 2 Tonight With Sasaki vs. Painter (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Dodgers 4, Phillies 2. Game 1 is theirs.

Tonight: Roki Sasaki (3.52 ERA, last 4 starts) vs. Andrew Painter. The hottest series in baseball continues.

7:10 PM PT.

#BallparkBanter #Dodgers #Phillies

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Ohtani pitched Wednesday. Sánchez pitches Monday.

Two of the most dominant starters on the planet just narrowly missed each other in the Phillies-Dodgers series.

Sometimes baseball teases you.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Baseball

article.headline: Dodgers Take Game 1 Over Phillies, 4-2 — MLB's Best Series Continues Tonight

stories.title: J.P. Crawford Hits Two HRs for First Time in Career, Mariners Walk Off D-Backs 7-6 in 10 (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
J.P. CRAWFORD — two homers. Same game. First time in his career.

Arozarena walk-off double in the 10th. Mariners 7, D-backs 6.

Their fourth straight win.

#BallparkBanter #Mariners #MLB

article.headline: First Career Multi-HR Game: J.P. Crawford Powers Mariners Past D-Backs 7-6 in 10

stories.title: Cardinals 6-5 Cubs — Velazquez 3-Run HR, NL Central Race Tightens (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Cardinals 6, Cubs 5.

Velazquez 3-run homer, Herrera and Saggese went deep. The NL Central race isn't dead yet — even with Milwaukee 33-20.

Game 2 today.

#BallparkBanter #Cardinals #MLB

article.headline: Cardinals' Velazquez Launches 3-Run HR in 6-5 Win Over Cubs — NL Central Gets Interesting

stories.title: Yankees 8, Oakland 2 — Latest From the AL East Race (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Yankees 8, A's 2.

New York is 36-22 and chasing Tampa in the AL East. Schlittler (7-2, 1.50 ERA) has them legitimate.

The East is getting interesting.

#BallparkBanter #Yankees #MLB

article.headline: Yankees Roll Past Oakland 8-2 — AL East Race Shaping Up as a Big One

stories.title: Saturday's MLB Slate — Weekend Games to Watch (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Saturday MLB to-do list:

Phillies-Dodgers Game 2 (Sasaki vs Painter, 7:10 PM PT). Cubs-Cards again. Ramírez one swing closer to HR No. 300.

This is a good baseball Saturday.

article.headline: Saturday MLB: Phillies-Dodgers Game 2, Cubs-Cardinals, and More
